target.rawSql: SELECT "title", "text", "eventDateTime" FROM "fastnetmon"."attack_events" WHERE   ( eventDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND eventDateTime <= $__toTime ) LIMIT 100

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time,  avg(bits) Bits FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'incoming' ) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time,  avg(packets) Packets FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'incoming' ) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as "time", avg(bits) as Bits FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'outgoing' ) GROUP BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time,  avg(packets) Packets FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'outgoing' ) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as "time", avg(tcp_syn_bits) as tcp_syn, avg(tcp_bits) as tcp, avg(udp_bits) as udp, avg(icmp_bits) as icmp, avg(fragmented_bits) as fragmented, avg(dropped_bits) as dropped FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'incoming' ) GROUP BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as "time", avg(tcp_syn_packets) as tcp_syn, avg(tcp_packets) as tcp, avg(udp_packets) as udp, avg(icmp_packets) as icmp, avg(fragmented_packets) as fragmented, avg(dropped_packets) as dropped FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'incoming' ) GROUP BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as "time", avg(tcp_syn_bits) as tcp_syn, avg(tcp_bits) as tcp, avg(udp_bits) as udp, avg(icmp_bits) as icmp, avg(fragmented_bits) as fragmented, avg(dropped_bits) as dropped FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'outgoing' ) GROUP BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as "time", avg(tcp_syn_packets) as tcp_syn, avg(tcp_packets) as tcp , avg(udp_packets) as udp, avg(icmp_packets) as icmp, avg(fragmented_packets) as fragmented, avg(dropped_packets) as dropped  FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( direction = 'outgoing' ) GROUP BY time
